log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster.
→ Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 20] FAIL! 32 necrotic damage. HP: 35/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 28 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 25 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
